MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Heather Volante for (executor) Lanita Hopkins appeared via court call.

The status on filing petition to close estate/status report was continued to March 16, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-18-2013 Continued To Dec-30-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Heather Volante for and with Lanita Hopkins.

Ms. Volante stated that the house was never in the Estate, that it was in the Trust, that the house is in foreclosure, that Ms. Hopkins already distributed funds to herself prior to coming in as Counsel and that funds were used to maintain the two properties. Ms. Hopkins stated that both Sons received $20,000.00, that Jessie has five children whom were Beneficiaries, that Jessie received funds for the pecuniary gifts because the Children were minors at the time and agreed to a lien on the property for Ms. Volante's fees. The Petition for Final Distribution was continued to December 30, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Ms. Hopkins to obtain statements/waivers from Jessica Garrett and Monique Garrett (both over the age of 18 years) with regard to distribution of the remaining balances of their pecuniary gifts (Jessica's remaining balance of $3,500.00 and Monique's remaining balance of $2,000.00) and for a declaration from Ms. Hopkins agreeing to a lien on the property for the amount of Ms. Volante's fees.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Loos. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-23-2013 Continued To Nov-18-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-26-2013 Continued To Sep-23-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Heather Volante for and with Lanita Hopkins (Executor).

The Court stated that it needs receipts as to what assets the Executor received and distributed, and questioned the eight pecuniary gifts to the Family members. The Court also stated that sanctions are no longer an issue. The Court denied Ms. Volante's request for fees to be converted to a money judgment. The request to approve Lanita's Assumption of Liability Agreement was also denied. The accounting petition was continued to September 23, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Counsel to file receipts.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Status Report
Off Calendar May-29-2013 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Status Report
Off Calendar Apr-03-2013 Continued To May-29-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Heather Volante for Lanita Hoppkins (Executor).

Ms. Volante stated that Ms. Hopkins stipulated to a stay lift in the bankruptcy action so that they can proceed with the estate, and that Ms. Hopkins is in discussion with investors to try and bring the mortgage payments up to date and reimburse the estate for payment of fees. Ms. Volante also stated the possibility of Ms. Hopkins paying fees upfront or getting an equity line in about a year and then pay fees. The Court advised Counsel that there is a procedure in place with regard to petitioning for fees when a bankruptcy is in place. Status on filing of Petition for Final distribution was continued to May 29, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy Loos.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Status Report
Off Calendar Feb-20-2013 Continued To Apr-03-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Heather Volante for Lanita Hopkins (Executor).

Ms. Volante requested a continuance stating that the creditors meeting in the bankruptcy matter was delayed because Ms. Hopkins had not filed income taxes and that the bankruptcy matter was continued March 28, 2013. In addition, Ms. Volante stated that she was told by the bankruptcy attorney that they could file a motion for the bankruptcy trustee to sell the home and raised the issue of payment of her fees. Ms. Volante also informed the court that the house is in the trust and not under the supervision of the court. Status on filing of a petition for final distribution was continued to April 3, 2013 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Brown.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Status Report
Off Calendar Dec-18-2012 Continued To Feb-20-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Heather Volante for and with Lantia Hopkins (Executor).

Ms. Volante informed the Court that Ms. Hopkins filed for bankruptcy on December 12, 2012, that the foreclosure sale was stopped and that Ms. Hopkins is still pursuing a loan modification. The Court informed Ms. Volante and Ms. Hopkins that bankruptcy disqualifies the Amininstrator from acting and that it also stays this action. Status on filing of a petition for final distribution or status report was continued to February 20, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on bankruptcy.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Status Report
Off Calendar Oct-09-2012 Continued To Dec-18-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Heather Volante for and with Lanita Hopkins (Executor).

Ms. Volante stated that the one final obstacle was payment of fees, that the Estate account ($389,000.00) was depleted/used to pay bequests and upkeep of the properties, that the one remaining property was in foreclosure and that Ms. Hopkins now meeting with an Attorney to try and save the property/refinance. Ms. Hopkins stated that the sell date for the property is December 6, 2012, that she has to have something in place a day or two before the sell date and that she is living in property. The Court reminded Ms. Hopkins that obligations need to be paid. Status on filing of the Petition for Final Distribution was continued to December 18, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Clauzel.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Status Report
Off Calendar Jun-19-2012 Continued To Oct-09-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Heather Volante for and with Lanita Hopkins.

Ms. Volante stated that they were working on the tax return issue, that they will continue working on distribution and obtaining receipts, and that all creditor's claims have been resolved. Status on the Petition for Final Distribution or Status Report was continued to October 9, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Andrade.

Off Calendar Mar-13-2012 Continued To Jun-12-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Heather Volante for and with Lanita Hopkins (Executor).

Ms. Volante stated that the Estate was not ready for final distribution, that there were $60,000.00 in specific bequests that were yet to be paid and that Ms. Hopkins is trying to obtain an equity loan on the property in order to pay those bequests. Status of the Petition for Final Distribution was continued to June 12, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Order to Show Cause was taken off calendar and sanctions will not be imposed.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Watts.
